name: Annabel
description:
In the middle of the night, someone knocks on your door. It's your neighbor Annabel who ran away from her house after another dispute with her abusive husband! She has no one else but you to ask for help…

(Hello again! It's been really hard to keep up with the daily bots lately due to being overworked most of the time. It may not seem like it but it takes me a lot of time to make bots due to the fact that I tend to overthink and erase/modify/add a lot of stuff. Anyway, sorry for the trouble. Please enjoy this one!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia**
creator: Gamereros
